parameters.content:
Telegram channel adapter

Purpose: receive Telegram updates, validate Telegram webhook secret, normalize messages into the shared channel-neutral bot contract, call the shared RAG core, then send a Telegram reply.

Secrets stay in .env / n8n environment only:
- TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
- TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET
- INTERNAL_TEST_TOKEN
- SUPABASE_REST_URL
- SUPABASE_SECRET_KEY

This workflow must not contain company-specific prompts, prices, customer data, or tokens.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ tenant_id: $json.tenant_id, channel: $json.channel, thread_id: $json.thread_id, sender_id: $json.sender_id, sender_username: $json.sender_username, sender_display_name: $json.sender_display_name, message_text: $json.message_text, message_id: $json.message_id, raw_event: $json.raw_event }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ p_tenant_id: $json.tenant_id, p_channel: "telegram", p_thread_id: $json.thread_id, p_reason: $json.escalation_reason || "telegram_human_handoff", p_summary: $json.escalation_summary || null, p_confidence: $json.confidence }) }}
